name: chain_ph_launch_kickfolder_turn_your_macs_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Kickfolder: Turn your Mac's top edge into a hidden command center

stages.task: Extract Kickfolder maker profiles from PH via Playwright: name, twitter, linkedin, upvote count, comments
Score maker: solo vs team, prior launches, tech stack, B2B relevance — solo indie devs score highest for reply rate
Queue 48h post-launch outreach: personalized hook referencing Kickfolder + offer relevant service (dev/design/growth) — no pitch spam
